completeness.rationale: The triage summary contains none of the expected information. Despite the reporter providing detailed answers covering all six expected extracts, the summary discards everything due to a parse error, listing environment as 'unknown' and information gaps as 'All'.

accuracy.rationale: The summary is entirely inaccurate — it claims the problem is 'Agent could not produce JSON' rather than anything related to the actual crash. Root cause is 'unknown' despite the reporter clearly pointing to encoding issues with imported CSV data in large task lists.

efficiency.rationale: The conversation itself was efficient: one well-structured set of questions elicited all the needed information in a single exchange. Only 2 turns were needed. The efficiency of the conversation was good, but the output failure negates the value.

question_quality.rationale: The initial questions were well-targeted and covered the key diagnostic areas: what is being saved, crash behavior, platform/version, and when the issue started. They were well-framed and professional, prompting the reporter to volunteer highly relevant details about CSV import, list size threshold, and auto-save vs manual save.

actionability.rationale: The triage summary is completely useless for a developer. It says 'Manual triage required' with no problem description, no reproduction steps, no environment info, and no root cause hypothesis. A developer would have to re-read the entire conversation or re-triage from scratch.

notable_strengths: Initial question set was well-structured and comprehensive, covering all key diagnostic dimensions in a single turn
Empathetic and professional tone in the opening message
Efficient conversation — extracted all needed information in one round of questions
notable_weaknesses: Complete failure to produce a usable triage summary despite having all the information needed
Parse error in the final output destroyed all value from an otherwise good conversation
No fallback mechanism — when JSON generation failed, the agent produced a stub instead of a plain-text summary
most_insightful_question: Is this new behavior? Was saving working fine before, and if so, do you recall when it started failing — after an update, after a specific action, etc.?
missed_opportunities: No opportunity was missed in questioning — the failure was entirely in summarization, not information gathering
